description_long: This rifle features a classic design with a wooden stock and handguard, paired with a black metal receiver and barrel. The magazine is curved and made of dark metal, typical of many assault rifles. A bayonet is affixed to the end of the barrel, adding a close-quarters combat capability. The rifle is equipped with iron sights, with both the front and rear sights clearly visible. The overall finish is a mix of matte black metal and polished wood, giving it a rugged yet traditional appearance. The construction suggests durability and functionality, suitable for urban environments.
description: A traditional rifle with a wooden stock, black metal receiver, curved magazine, and attached bayonet, featuring iron sights.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the muzzle end, showing the bayonet tip and a narrow profile of the barrel.
description_view_1: The left side view displays the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, curved magazine, and bayonet.
description_view_2: The rifle is viewed from above, revealing the top of the receiver, handguard, and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_3: The right side view shows the opposite profile, with the wooden stock, magazine, and bayonet clearly visible.
